title: Websites

vocabulary.meaning: a connection you click to open another page
to put a file onto the Internet
connected to or available through the Internet

questions: What springs to mind when you hear the word 'website'?
Do you think websites are interesting?
Can you remember the very first website you looked at?
What's your favourite website?
What would websites would you recommend other students to learn English?
Would you like to have your own website?
What things really annoy you about websites?
How many websites do you look at in an average day / week?
How long do you spend looking at one website?
Have you ever got angry with a website?
What do you think makes a good website?
Can you think of a website you use (and like) that needs to better designed?
If you started your own website, what would you call it?
Do you think there are websites that are dangerous?
From what age do you think children should be allowed to look at websites?
Do you think your government should be able to censor websites?
What's the most useful website for you?
What do you think of websites that have pop-up music and ads?
Do you think all websites should follow the same rules?
What do you think websites will be like in the future?
